title: Advanced Image Viewer
description: Settings for wheel-zoom, drag-pan, and folder navigation in the advanced image viewer.

navEnabled.title: Enable folder navigation
navEnabled.description: When enabled, the previous/next keys open the previous or next image in the same folder.

prevKey.title: Previous image key
prevKey.description: Key that opens the previous image in the folder. Uses Lumino keystroke syntax (e.g. 'ArrowLeft', 'PageUp', 'Shift ArrowLeft').

nextKey.title: Next image key
nextKey.description: Key that opens the next image in the folder. Uses Lumino keystroke syntax (e.g. 'ArrowRight', 'PageDown', 'Shift ArrowRight').

zoomStep.title: Zoom step
zoomStep.description: Fractional zoom change per wheel notch or toolbar zoom click (0.1 = 10% per step).
